chatFontSize.description: Size used for chat message bodies
chatFontSize.title: Chat font size

pointerCursors.description: Change the cursor to a pointer when hovering over interactive elements
pointerCursors.title: Use pointer cursors

theme.description: Use light, dark, or match your system
theme.title: Theme

language.description: Choose the display language for the app
language.title: Language

captions.account: Synced with your local gh / glab CLI.
captions.inbox: Pick which items each connected account contributes to Contexts.

notifications.title: Desktop Notifications
notifications.description: Show system notifications when sessions complete or need input

notificationSound.title: Notification sound
notificationSound.description: Play a sound when a desktop notification fires

terminalHoverExpansion.title: Expand terminals on hover
terminalHoverExpansion.description: Enlarge inspector terminals when the cursor rests over them.

terminalMode.title: Terminal Mode
terminalMode.description: Adds a composer toggle that opens your prompt in the agent's terminal UI instead of a chat session. Claude and Codex only.

alwaysShowContextUsage.title: Always show context usage
alwaysShowContextUsage.description: By default, context usage is only shown when more than 70% is used.

usageStats.title: Usage Stats
usageStats.description: Show account rate limits beside the composer.

autoArchiveOnMerge.title: Auto-archive on merge
autoArchiveOnMerge.description: When a workspace's linked PR/MR is merged, archive the workspace automatically.

followUpBehavior.title: Follow-up behavior
followUpBehavior.description: Queue follow-ups while the agent runs or steer the current run.
followUpBehavior.pressToInvert: Press {{shortcut}} to do the opposite for one message.

claudeThinking.title: Claude Code Thinking Display
claudeThinking.description: Controls how Claude Code returns thinking content.

tooltip.omittedBody: thinking blocks are empty. The server skips streaming thinking tokens, so the final text streams sooner. Reduces latency, not cost.

archiveCleanup.title: Clean up archived workspaces
archiveCleanup.description_one: Permanently delete the {{count}} archived workspace, including its sessions and chat history.
archiveCleanup.description_other: Permanently delete all {{count}} archived workspaces, including their sessions and chat history.
archiveCleanup.confirmDescription_one: This will permanently delete the {{count}} archived workspace, including its sessions and chat history. This cannot be undone.
archiveCleanup.confirmDescription_other: This will permanently delete all {{count}} archived workspaces, including their sessions and chat history. This cannot be undone.

toast.nothing: No archived workspaces to clean up
toast.partial_one: Cleaned up {{deleted}}, but {{count}} workspace could not be deleted
toast.partial_other: Cleaned up {{deleted}}, but {{count}} workspaces could not be deleted

status.notConfigured: Updater is not configured in this build.
status.checking: Checking GitHub releases in the background.
status.downloading: Downloading an update in the background.
status.downloadedVersion: {{version}} has been downloaded and is ready to install.
status.downloaded: The latest update has been downloaded and is ready to install.
status.disabledWaiting: Automatic update checks are waiting for updater configuration.
status.idle: Checks GitHub releases, downloads updates quietly, then prompts when ready.

toast.installFailedFallback: Unable to install the downloaded update.

summary.upToDate: Grex CLI and skills are up to date with {{version}}.
summary.healthy: Grex CLI and skills look healthy.
summary.needsAttention: One or more components need attention.

cli.stale: An older copy exists at the install path.

skills.signInPrompt: Sign in to Claude Code or Codex, then re-check.

toast.readFailed: Unable to read Grex components status
toast.upToDate: Grex components are up to date

showOnboarding.title: Show Onboarding Again
showOnboarding.description: Mark onboarding as incomplete so it appears the next time Grex starts.
showOnboarding.notice: Onboarding will be shown on the next launch.

resetData.title: Reset All Data
resetData.description: Delete all workspaces, sessions, messages, and repositories from the development database. Filesystem artefacts (worktrees, paste-cache) will also be removed.
resetData.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete all workspaces, sessions, and repositories from the development database. This action cannot be undone. You can re-import from Conductor afterwards.

plain.threadsHint: Open threads (Todo and Snoozed) appear in the feed.

mobileCompanion.title: Mobile companion
mobileCompanion.description: Drive Grex from your phone's browser over a private link. Enabling starts a local server and a Cloudflare tunnel — no app to install.

permanentUrl.title: Permanent URL
permanentUrl.stable: Your phone connects at a fixed address that survives desktop restarts.
permanentUrl.signedIn: Allocate a permanent remote-*.grex.ai address so you never have to re-scan.
permanentUrl.signedOut: The quick link changes when you restart. Sign in to Cloudflare for a permanent address.

pair.title: Pair a phone
pair.ready: Generate a QR code, then scan it with your phone's camera.
pair.waiting: Waiting for the public URL to come up…
pair.scanHint: Scan with your phone's camera. The code carries a one-time device token — pair once and the phone reconnects on its own.

repositoryPreferences.title: Preferences
repositoryPreferences.description: Repo-level built-in prompts used by Grex actions and new chats.
repositoryPreferences.placeholderGeneral: Add custom instructions for all agents working in this repo.
repositoryPreferences.placeholderDefault: Add your preferences here. The agent will be told to prioritize these instructions over its default instructions.

descriptions.createPr: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Create PR button.
descriptions.review: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click Review in the inspector.
descriptions.fixErrors: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Fix errors button.
descriptions.resolveConflicts: Add custom instructions sent to the agent when you click the Resolve conflicts button.
descriptions.branchRename: Add custom instructions used when Grex generates the first branch rename suggestion for a new chat.
descriptions.general: Add custom instructions sent to the agent at the start of every new chat.

remoteOrigin.title: Remote origin
remoteOrigin.description: Where should we push, pull, and create PRs?
remoteOrigin.orphanedNotice_one: {{count}} workspace targets a branch not on this remote. Update it via the header branch picker.
remoteOrigin.orphanedNotice_other: {{count}} workspaces target a branch not on this remote. Update them via the header branch picker.

branchFrom.title: Branch new workspaces from
branchFrom.description: Each workspace is an isolated copy of your codebase.

nonGit.title: Non-git repository
nonGit.description: This is a local folder that isn't a git repository — no remote, branch, or account settings apply.

forge.connectCta: Connect a {{provider}} account to enable the {{provider}} workflow for this repo.

branchPrefix.title: Branch prefix
branchPrefix.description: Prefix added to branch names when creating new workspaces in this repo.

delete.title: Delete Repository
delete.description: Permanently remove this repository and all its workspaces, sessions, and messages.
delete.confirmDescription: This will permanently delete all workspaces, sessions, and messages associated with {{name}}. This cannot be undone.

scripts.title: Scripts
scripts.description: Commands that run when workspaces are set up, run, or archived.
scripts.lockedMessage: Set by this workspace's grex.json — edit it there

setup.label: Setup script
setup.description: Available from the Setup tab in any workspace
setup.autoRunTooltip: On by default — setup runs automatically as soon as a workspace is created. Turn off to run it manually from the Setup tab.
setup.autoRunAria: Auto-run setup script on workspace creation

archive.label: Archive script
archive.description: Runs when a workspace is archived

run.title: Run scripts
run.description: Each entry appears in the Inspector's Run dropdown.
run.lockedEmpty: Set by this workspace's grex.json — edit it there.
run.emptyDescription: Add one to expose a command — like a dev server, test runner, or background task.
run.exclusiveTooltip: Only let one workspace run this script at a time. Starting a new run stops any other run in this repository — useful when the script binds a fixed port.
run.exclusiveAria: Stop other runs in this repository when starting a new run
run.stopCommandTooltip: Optional cleanup command run when you click Stop. Useful for scripts that manage external resources (docker compose down, supabase stop). Same env + cwd as the main command.
run.managedByProject: Managed by grex.json — edit the file to add or change

conductorImport.title: Import from Conductor
conductorImport.importLocal: Import workspaces from a local Conductor installation
conductorImport.settingUp: Setting up repositories and copying data...
